description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in manual mode was stopped in lane at a stop sign on eastbound Alameda,  preparing to turn left onto 
Treat Avenue in San Francisco. At that time, a passenger car (Vehicle 2), making a wide right turn from Treat Avenue onto westbound 
Alameda Street, collided head-on with the front of the stopped Zoox vehicle. Both vehicles sustained moderate damage, and the police were 
not called. The Zoox vehicle operator and the software operator, who was seated in the front passenger seat, reported injuries following the 
collision.
Print
Clear Form
